headlines.title: Suspect in Ann Widdecombe murder seen on CCTV getting into car with object
headlines.description: The man, dressed in a white shirt and shorts, can be seen getting into a red car outside a house in Rotherham in the footage.

headlines.title: More than 2,700 people may have died in exceptional May and June heatwaves in England and Wales
headlines.description: Most deaths will have occurred in the June heatwave, experts say, when a rare red heat alert was issued.

headlines.title: Heatwave to intensify in second week as wildfires burn across UK
headlines.description: After a brief drop in temperature many areas will see heat and humidity build again this week

headlines.title: UK seeking extradition of man suspected of killing wife and two daughters
headlines.description: Ndodana Mkhanyisi Tshuma is in court after being arrested in Johannesburg.

headlines.title: Witness says he crawled for exit as flames swept through Bangkok bar
headlines.description: A musician who was performing when the fire broke out says he crawled for the exit - and was thrown from the bar when something exploded.

headlines.title: New era for Gibraltar with removal of 118-year-old border controls with Spain
headlines.description: It is hoped that free movement between the UK territory and Spain will provide an economic boost.

headlines.title: Home secretary to set out plan to deport Rochdale grooming gang leader
headlines.description: Calls have grown to deport Rochdale grooming gang ringleader Shabir Ahmed after his release from prison.

headlines.title: UK begins trials of Ebola vaccine developed in just eight weeks
headlines.description: The UK medicines regulator has given approval for an experimental vaccine to be tested on healthy adults.

headlines.title: Arthur Fery invites Prince George and Princess Charlotte to play tennis
headlines.description: The Princess of Wales congratulated Arthur Fery on his run to the semi-finals and wished him a happy birthday.

headlines.title: Wildfire raging south of Paris could have been set deliberately, says minister
headlines.description: It was the first time firefighting planes had been sent up from the normally drier and hotter south of the country to tackle fires in the Paris region.

headlines.title: These are unprecedented times - England should enjoy them
headlines.description: A record of four semi-finals in the past five international tournaments for England is outstanding. It is time to accept that this is where England belong.

headlines.title: BBC experts pick their England World Cup semi-final XI - do you agree?
headlines.description: England are through to the World Cup semi-finals, but who would you pick in your starting XI?

headlines.title: Infantino opens door to 64-team World Cup
headlines.description: Plans for a 64-team men's world cup are set to be picked up and assessed in detail after the 2026 tournament with Fifa boss Gianni Infantino saying football needs to be "for the whole world".

headlines.title: Hollywood blockbusters and arthouse films: Sam Neill's best-known roles in pictures
headlines.description: The beloved actor's career ranged from box office blockbusters to thrillers and award-winning dramas.

headlines.title: How to get a better deal on banking, energy and internet
headlines.description: Changing your broadband or energy supplier, or even your bank, for a better deal is simpler than it used to be.

headlines.title: Burnham set for No 10: BBC correspondents on what Trump, Putin and others will make of him
headlines.description: In the US, China, Europe, Russia and elsewhere, how is the UK's expected new prime minister regarded?

headlines.title: Starting uni? What to know about the free NHS meningitis B jab in England
headlines.description: It follows the UK's largest and fastest growing meningitis B outbreak to date in Kent earlier this year.

headlines.title: Has SpaceX lost momentum one month after its stock market debut made history?
headlines.description: A month on from the firm's stock market debut, the reality of how SpaceX currently makes money has seemed to come into clearer focus.

headlines.title: From shock loss to Wimbledon title - resilient Sinner rises back to top
headlines.description: For a brief moment after his shock French Open loss, Jannik Sinner appeared vulnerable. He answered the critics by storming to a second Wimbledon title.

headlines.title: The Chinese graduate accused of being Mexico's 'fentanyl king'
headlines.description: Cartel members and ex-colleagues describe how Zhang Zhidong allegedly linked Chinese chemicals to Mexican drug labs.

headlines.title: Wildfire expected to spread due to heatwave as 36 homes evacuated
headlines.description: The blaze broke out near Conwy Mountain and the Sychnant Pass in Conwy county on Sunday.

headlines.title: Amber Davies calls out audience member for filming Legally Blonde performance
headlines.description: The ex-Love Islander says she asked for the theatregoer, who was sitting in the front row, to be kicked out.

headlines.title: I passed my Grade 8 piano exam with one hand
headlines.description: Freya Terris' achievement has inspired music exam board ABRSM to publish a new syllabus for one hand.

headlines.title: British couple return to village at heart of deadly Spanish wildfire
headlines.description: At least 13 people, including five believed to be Britons, were killed by Thursday's wildfire in Spain's Almeria province.

headlines.title: Heavy rains and flash floods in Bangladesh leave 51 dead
headlines.description: Thousands have lost their homes as flash floods and landslides have hit large parts of the country.

headlines.description: Enjoy the best shots of Wimbledon 2026, featuring Great Britain's Arthur Fery, Novak Djokovic, Coco Gauff and more.

headlines.title: Borrowed shoes, no Golden Boot - the story of the World Cup's greatest scorer
headlines.description: Just Fontaine's record of 13 goals in a single World Cup has stood for decades, but he never played in the tournament again after injury ended his career at the age of 28.
